data.title: Update sprint RED Task Dispatch and red-task-escalation.md for TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed
data.description:
## Description

Update the sprint orchestrator and shared escalation template to handle the new TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed value.

### Steps
1. In `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` Phase 4 RED Task Dispatch section, add a new case to the TEST_RESULT parser table:
   - `TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed` → Success. No new test was needed. Do NOT escalate to Tier 2. Proceed to normal task execution without TDD setup.
2. In `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md`, update the Tier 1 parser table:
   - Add row: `TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed` → Success. No TDD setup needed. Do NOT escalate.
   - Update the Tier 3 parser table with the same addition
   - Update the flow diagram to show the third outcome path

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` — Edit (RED Task Dispatch section)
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md` — Edit (parser tables + flow diagram)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md handles no_new_tests_needed
  Verify: grep -q "no_new_tests_needed" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Escalation template handles no_new_tests_needed
  Verify: grep -q "no_new_tests_needed" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md
